title: Photoreal Artistic Street Photography Recipe AI
sourceTitle: Photoreal Artistic Street Photography Recipe AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-photoreal candid street photograph of adult woman with short dark hair and calm face in rain-wet Tokyo backstreet near a small noodle shop, built for documentary realism and restrained cinematic film texture. Subject: Visible clothing, accessories, grooming, and styling: olive trench coat, black trousers, and white canvas tote. Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Scene: rain-wet Tokyo backstreet near a small noodle shop at blue-hour drizzle with warm shop light spill, grounded by wet pavement reflections, vending machine glow, hanging noren curtain as authentic location evidence rather than decorative filler. Composition: 4:5 portrait street photograph with close but respectful distance, intentionally imperfect framing, subject clarity, environmental context, and an unposed moment that feels found rather than staged. Signature Elements: Pose, gesture, or foreground action: pausing to check her phone under an awning. Preserved photoreal artistic street photography recipe source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-photoreal candid film still with subtle 35mm grain, restrained cinematic realism, natural dynamic range, crisp but natural sharpness, and honest documentary mood. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Existing-location light from blue-hour drizzle with warm shop light spill; preserve believable shadows, practical reflections, and natural atmosphere without studio polish. Camera: 35mm documentary lens at eye level, eye-level or street-photographer perspective, sharp focus on the eyes, shallow but believable depth of field, and natural lens imperfections. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
